One simple dish you can make with only rice, oats, and wheat flour is a Vegetable Rice Pilaf.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rice
- 1/3 cup oats
- 1/3 cup wheat flour
- 2 cups vegetable broth
- 2 tbsp oil
- 1 onion, diced
- 1 carrot, diced
- 1 celery stalk, diced
- 1 garlic clove, minced
- Salt and pepper

Instructions:
1. In a large, non-stick skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the onion, carrot, and celery, and cook for around 5 minutes until they soften.
2. Add the garlic, rice, and oats to the skillet, and cook for another 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Pour the vegetable broth into the skillet and bring to a boil.
4. Cover the skillet, reduce the heat to low, and let it simmer for around 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the broth is absorbed.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the wheat flour with a little bit of water until it forms a paste.
6. Add the wheat flour paste to the skillet and stir until well combined.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

Tip: You can add any other vegetables or spices that you have on hand to give this dish more flavor and variety. For example, you could add some peas, bell peppers, or even curry powder.
which simple dish can I make with only rice,oats,milk? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only rice, oats, and milk is a Rice Pudding.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rice
- 1/2 cup oats
- 2 cups milk
- 1/3 cup sugar
- 1 tsp vanilla extract
- Cinnamon (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a large, non-stick saucepan, combine the rice, oats, milk, and sugar. 
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer, stirring occasionally, for around 20-25 minutes. 
3. When the rice and oats are tender and the mixture has thickened to a pudding-like consistency, remove the saucepan from the heat. 
4. Stir in the vanilla extract. 
5. Serve hot or cold, sprinkled with cinnamon if desired.

Tip: If you want a creamier texture, you can use half-and-half or heavy cream instead of milk. You can also add raisins, chopped nuts, or shredded coconut to give your rice pudding more flavor and texture.
which simple dish can I make with only rice,oats,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only rice, oats and cream is a Creamy Oatmeal.

Ingredients:
- 1/2 cup rolled oats
- 1/2 cup cooked rice
- 1 cup heavy cream
- 1 cup water
- Pinch of salt
- 1/4 cup brown sugar
- Cinnamon (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water and salt to a boil over high heat.
2. Add the rolled oats and reduce heat to medium-low.
3. Let the oats cook, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes or until they begin to thicken and absorb the water.
4. Add the cooked rice, heavy cream, and brown sugar to the saucepan. Stir until well combined.
5. Let the mixture cook, stirring occasionally, for 8-10 minutes or until the oatmeal reaches desired consistency.
6. Serve hot with a sprinkle of cinnamon if desired.

Tip: You can add any desired toppings to your creamy oatmeal, such as fresh fruit, nuts, or honey. Be sure to stir frequently to prevent the mixture from sticking to the bottom of the saucepan.
which simple dish can I make with only rice,wheat flour,milk? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only rice, wheat flour, and milk is a Rice Flour Pancake.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rice flour
- 1/2 cup wheat flour
- 1/2 tsp salt
- 1 tsp baking powder
- 2 tbsp sugar
- 1 cup milk
- 1 egg
- 2 tbsp vegetable oil

Instructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the rice flour, wheat flour, salt, baking powder, and sugar together.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, egg and vegetable oil.
3. Slowly pour the milk mixture into the flour mixture, stirring until a smooth batter forms.
4. Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
5. Once hot, ladle about 1/4 cup of batter onto the pan for each pancake.
6. Cook the pancake until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to dry, then flip and cook until the other side is golden brown.
7. Repeat until all of the batter has been used.

Tip: You can add vanilla extract and/or cinnamon to the batter to give your pancakes more flavor. Also, be sure to grease your pan or griddle with a little bit of oil or cooking spray before cooking each pancake to prevent them from sticking.
which simple dish can I make with only rice,wheat flour,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only rice, wheat flour, and cream is a Creamy Chicken and Rice Casserole.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rice
- 1/2 cup wheat flour
- 2 cups chicken broth
- 1 cup heavy cream
- 2 tbsp butter
- 1 onion, chopped
- 2 garlic cloves, minced
- 2 cups cooked, shredded chicken
- Salt and pepper
- 1/2 cup breadcrumbs
- 2 tbsp chopped parsley (optional)

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large, non-stick skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Add the onion and garlic, and cook for around 5 minutes until they soften.
4. Add the wheat flour to the skillet, stirring until well combined with the butter.
5. Gradually pour in the chicken broth, whisking constantly until the mixture is smooth.
6. Stir in the heavy cream, cooked rice, and shredded chicken.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with breadcrumbs.
9. Bake for around 25 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired, before serving.

Tip: You can add any desired vegetables to this dish, such as peas, carrots, or broccoli, to make it even more nutritious and flavorful. Also, be sure to use a baking dish that is large enough to hold all of the ingredients without overflowing.
which simple dish can I make with only rice,milk,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only rice, milk, and cream is a Creamy Rice Pudding.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rice
- 4 cups milk
- 1 cup heavy cream
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 tsp vanilla extract
- Cinnamon (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a medium-sized heavy saucepan, combine rice, milk, and sugar.
2. Cook the mixture over medium heat until it comes to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for approximately 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the rice is tender and the mixture thickens.
4. Stir in the heavy cream and vanilla extract, and let the mixture simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes, until it thickens.
5. Remove the pan from the heat and let it cool slightly.
6. Transfer the rice pudding to a bowl or individual serving cups.
7. Sprinkle cinnamon on top, if desired.
8. Let the dish cool completely or serve warm.

Tip: You can add raisins or chopped dried fruits to add more flavor and texture to the pudding. You can also substitute the sugar with honey or maple syrup for a healthier alternative. Be sure to keep stirring the pudding to prevent it from sticking to the bottom of the saucepan.
which simple dish can I make with only oats,wheat flour,milk? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only oats, wheat flour, and milk is Oatmeal Pancakes.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup oats
- 1/2 cup wheat flour
- 2 tsp baking powder
- 1/2 tsp salt
- 2 tbsp sugar
- 1 cup milk
- 1 egg
- 2 tbsp vegetable oil

Instructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, blend the oats into a fine powder.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the oat flour, wheat flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk the milk, egg, and vegetable oil together.
4. Gradually pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture, stirring until a smooth batter forms.
5. Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
6. Once hot, ladle about 1/4 cup of batter onto the pan for each pancake.
7. Cook the pancake until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to dry, then flip and cook until the other side is golden brown.
8. Repeat until all of the batter has been used.

Tip: To make the pancake batter thinner, add more milk. You can also add vanilla extract or cinnamon to the batter to give your pancakes more flavor. Additionally, if you prefer your pancakes to be crispy, add a little bit of butter or oil to the pan.
which simple dish can I make with only oats,wheat flour,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only oats, wheat flour, and cream is a Creamy Oatmeal Porridge.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup oats
- 1/2 cup wheat flour
- 1/2 tsp salt
- 1 tbsp honey
- 2 cups cream
- 1 1/2 cups water
- Cinnamon (optional)
- Fruits, nuts or seeds (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a large saucepan, mix the oats, wheat flour, salt and honey.
2. Stir in the cream and water.
3. Place the saucepan over medium heat and stir the mixture until it starts boiling.
4. Reduce the heat to low and let it cook for about 15-20 minutes until the mixture thickens and the oats are cooked.
5. Serve hot with a sprinkle of cinnamon or fruits, nuts or seeds to garnish if desired.

Tip: If you prefer a thinner consistency for your oatmeal, add more water or milk. You can also adjust the amount of honey according to your taste. Be careful not to overcook the oatmeal porridge as it tends to thicken further on cooling. Stirring will also help to keep the mixture from sticking to the bottom of the pot.
which simple dish can I make with only oats,milk,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only oats, milk, and cream is an Oatmeal Cream Pie.

Ingredients:
- 1 1/2 cups oats
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1/2 cup cream
- 1/2 cup brown sugar
- 1/3 cup unsalted butter, melted
- 1/2 tsp vanilla extract
- 1/2 tsp cinnamon
- 1/4 tsp nutmeg
- 1/2 cup flour
- 1/2 tsp baking powder
- 1/2 tsp baking soda
- 1 1/2 cups cream cheese frosting

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the oats, milk, cream, brown sugar, melted butter, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and nutmeg until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Gradually stir the flour mixture into the oat mixture until a dough forms.
5. Scoop the dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making 12-16 equal-sized balls.
6. Press down on each ball with a fork to flatten it, then bake for around 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
7. Let the cookies cool for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Once the cookies have cooled, spread cream cheese frosting on the bottom side of one cookie, then sandwich it with another cookie.
9. Repeat until all cookies are used up.

Tip: You can add raisins, chopped nuts, or shredded coconut to the oat mixture to give your oatmeal cream pies more flavor and texture. Make sure to use room temperature ingredients in your cream cheese frosting, otherwise it may become too runny.
which simple dish can I make with only wheat flour,milk,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only wheat flour, milk, and cream is a Creamy Mushroom Sauce.

Ingredients:
- 1/2 cup wheat flour
- 1/2 cup cream
- 2 cups milk
- 8 oz mushrooms, sliced
- 2 tbsp butter
- 2 cloves garlic, minced
- 1/2 tsp dried thyme
- 1/2 tsp salt
- 1/4 tsp black pepper

Instructions:
1. In a large, non-stick skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté for about 1 minute.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and sauté for about 5 minutes until they release their moisture and soften.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the wheat flour, cream, and milk until smooth.
5. Pour the milk mixture into the skillet with the mushrooms.
6. Add the thyme, salt, and black pepper, and stir until well combined.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for about 10-15 minutes until the sauce thickens.
8. Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool slightly.
9. Serve the creamy mushroom sauce with your favorite pasta or meat dish.

Tip: You can add other ingredients to the sauce, such as fresh parsley or grated Parmesan cheese, to add more flavor and depth to the dish. Also, be sure to continuously stir the sauce to prevent it from sticking and scorching at the bottom of the skillet.
which simple dish can I make with only wheat flour,milk,cream? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only wheat flour, milk, and cream is a Creamy Garlic Alfredo Sauce.

Ingredients:
- 1/2 cup wheat flour
- 1/2 cup cream
- 2 cups milk
- 2 cloves garlic, minced
- 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
- 1/4 tsp black pepper
- Salt to taste
- 1 tbsp unsalted butter

Instructions:
1. In a large, non-stick skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the wheat flour, cream, and milk until smooth.
4. Pour the milk mixture into the skillet with the garlic.
5. Add the Parmesan cheese and black pepper, and stir until well combined.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for about 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens.
7. Add salt to taste.
8. Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
9. Serve the creamy garlic Alfredo sauce with your favorite pasta dish.

Tip: You can add other ingredients to the sauce to give it more flavor and texture, such as cooked broccoli or sautéed mushrooms. Be careful not to overcook the sauce, otherwise it may become too thick and clumpy. If the sauce is too thick, you can thin it out with a little bit of milk.
which simple dish can I make with only garlic,onion,tomato,cucumber,spinach,rice,oats? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

One simple dish you can make with only garlic, onion, tomato, cucumber, spinach, rice, and oats is a Vegetable Rice Bowl.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup rice
- 1/2 cup oats
- 2 cups water
- Salt to taste
- 2 tbsp olive oil
- 2 cloves garlic, minced
- 1 onion, chopped
- 2 tomatoes, chopped
- 1 cucumber, chopped
- 2 cups fresh spinach
- Lemon wedges for garnish (optional)

Instructions:
1. In a medium-sized pot, bring the water to a boil over high heat, then add the rice and oats.
2. Add salt to taste, reduce the heat to low, and let it cook until all the water is absorbed and the rice and oats are tender.
3. In a large, non-stick skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
4. Add minced garlic and chopped onion and sauté until tender.
5. Add the chopped tomatoes and cook for another 5 minutes until they are tender.
6. Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until it wilts.
7. To assemble the rice bowls, divide the rice and oats mixture evenly among bowls. 
8. Top each bowl with the tomato and spinach mixture, and sprinkle with chopped cucumber.
9. Garnish with a lemon wedge and serve.

Tip: You can add any other desired vegetables or toppings to your rice bowl, such as avocado, sliced bell pepper, or chickpeas. Spice it up with your favorite herbs and spices for more flavor and different taste. You can also toss the cucumber with a little bit of vinegar or lemon juice before adding them to the bowls.

Ingredients
